title: carlina sitiensis
intro: Carlina sitiensis, also known as Himalayan carline thistle, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carlina sitiensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and leaves can also be used in poultices or ointments to treat skin conditions and wounds.
